Implementation complete. Here's what was done:

## Summary

The course page UI was successfully redesigned to match the Figma design reference while preserving all existing functionality.

### Files Modified (6 files):

1. **`ExamReminderBubble`** - Changed to centered pill badge style (removed chat bubble + avatar)
2. **`CoursePageContent`** - Updated layout with centered title, gradient background, and 3 footer buttons
3. **`CourseTabs`** - Changed to individual floating pill buttons with proper styling
4. **`CourseLessonCard`** - Added primary border accent, always-show percentage, and clock icon
5. **`src/i18n/he.json`** - Added Hebrew translations for new footer buttons
6. **`src/i18n/en.json`** - Added English translations for new footer buttons

### Verification:
- ✅ TypeScript: Passed
- ✅ Lint: Passed (no errors)  
- ✅ Unit tests: 3197 passed (2 pre-existing failures unrelated to changes)

### Design Changes:
- Exam reminder: Right-aligned bubble → Centered red pill
- Page title: Left section title → Large centered heading
- Tabs: Container pill → Individual floating pills
- Lesson cards: Transparent border → Primary border accent, percentage always visible
- Footer: 2 centered buttons → 3 grid buttons with icons
- Background: Flat strip → Gradient
